import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { ContactPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <ContactPage
    serviceName="Immigration and Citizenship Service"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    breadcrumb={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Contact' }]}
    phone={{ href: 'tel:+251111234567', label: '+251 11 123 4567' }}
    email={{ href: 'mailto:info@example.gov.et', label: 'info@example.gov.et' }}
    hours="Monday–Friday, 08:30–17:00 EAT"
    office="Bole Road, Addis Ababa"
    onSend={async () => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

How to reach the body — real `tel:`/`mailto:` links alongside office
hours and address, plus a short message form for anything that doesn't
need a full [Complaint Submission](/docs/patterns/complaint-submission).

```tsx
import { ContactPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<ContactPage
  serviceName="Immigration and Citizenship Service"
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  breadcrumb={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Contact' }]}
  phone={{ href: 'tel:+251111234567', label: '+251 11 123 4567' }}
  email={{ href: 'mailto:info@example.gov.et', label: 'info@example.gov.et' }}
  hours="Monday–Friday, 08:30–17:00 EAT"
  office="Bole Road, Addis Ababa"
  onSend={async (data) => {
    /* send the message; data: ContactMessageData */
  }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this for a body's general contact information, distinct from
[Complaint Submission](/docs/patterns/complaint-submission), which is for a
specific grievance that needs tracking.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`; phone and email render as real `tel:`/`mailto:` links, not
  plain text, so they're directly actionable.
- The message form's errors surface in a focusable `ErrorSummary`, same
  as every other ETHDS form.
- `hours` and `office` are passed in as already-formatted, translated
  content; `office` follows
  [Ethiopian address conventions](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/docs/localization/address-standards.md).

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `breadcrumb` | `BreadcrumbItem[]` | Yes |
| `phone` | `ContactMethod` (`{ href, label }`) | No |
| `email` | `ContactMethod` (`{ href, label }`) | No |
| `hours` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `office` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `onSend` | `(data: ContactMessageData) => Promise<void>` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<ContactPageLabels>` | No |
